title: Savory Smoky Middle-eastern Scotch Bonnet Fattoush Salad
description: A flavorful Middle-eastern salad featuring scotch bonnets, smoky dashi extract, and creamy herbs. This kid-friendly dish is perfect for a quick weeknight lunch.
instructions: Combine 1/4 cup of olive oil with 2 cloves of minced garlic in a large bowl.
Add 1/2 cup of crumbled feta cheese and 1/4 cup of chopped fresh parsley to the bowl, tossing to combine.
Add 2 diced scotch bonnets (seeds removed) to the bowl, stirring gently to distribute.
In a separate pan, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat and add 1 teaspoon of smoky dashi extract, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
Pour the dashi oil over the salad, tossing to coat.
Sprinkle 1 cup of crispy sumac-roasted chickpeas over the salad, garnishing with additional parsley if desired.
